principles: Navigator coordinates preparation and control and does not duplicate the primary CRM.
Store facts, statuses, responsibilities, deadlines and decisions instead of direct client identifiers.
Do not store files or full requisites of client documents.
Protect new data first; historical cleanup requires a separate preview and owner decision.

limited.address: Prefer a neutral object label, district or external CRM reference.
limited.object_registration_reference: Prefer received, checked or mismatch status instead of the full value.
limited.wizard_snapshot: Sanitize before browser persistence and server save.
limited.comments_and_notes: Use short professional facts and structured reasons.
limited.event_data: Use an allowlist and never copy the full deal payload.

display_rules.deal_title: Use an internal code and neutral object description.
display_rules.document_record: Store type, status, responsible employee, due date, verification result and short problem category.

viewer.replacement: Time-bounded read-only access to one explicitly selected deal when a real business need appears.
